title: cymbopogon thwaitesii
intro: Cymbopogon thwaitesii, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a perennial grass native to Sri Lanka and India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Cymbopogon thwaitesii include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and promoting a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Cymbopogon thwaitesii can be made into teas, essential oils, and infused waters to harness its medicinal properties.
